rule.name: RedSun T1211 — Non-Microsoft Cloud Files Sync Root Registration
rule.description: Detects CfRegisterSyncRoot invocation from a process that is not a known Cloud Files provider — the defining primitive of the Nightmare-Eclipse RedSun Cloud Files rewrite exploit
rule.query: registry where event.action in ("modification", "creation") and registry.path : "*\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\SyncRootManager\\*" and not process.name : ("OneDrive.exe", "OneDriveSetup.exe", "OneDriveStandaloneUpdater.exe", "Dropbox.exe", "GoogleDriveFS.exe", "iCloudDrive.exe", "BoxDrive.exe", "svchost.exe", "explorer.exe")

rule.name: RedSun T1006 — VSS Shadow Copy Enumeration From Non-Backup Process
rule.description: Detects a process that is not a known backup agent reading from \Device\HarddiskVolumeShadowCopy* — the discovery half of the RedSun T1006 primitive
rule.query: file where event.action in ("opened", "query") and file.path : "\\Device\\HarddiskVolumeShadowCopy*" and not process.name : ("svchost.exe", "VSSVC.exe", "vssadmin.exe", "wbengine.exe", "MsMpEng.exe", "robocopy.exe", "SenseIR.exe")

rule.name: RedSun T1574 — User Process Sets Mount Point Reparse Point
rule.description: Detects FSCTL_SET_REPARSE_POINT with IO_REPARSE_TAG_MOUNT_POINT from a non-privileged user process, the reparse-redirect primitive of the RedSun chain
rule.query: file where event.action : ("set-reparse-point", "reparse-point-modification") and file.attributes : "reparse_point" and (file.extension : "*" or event.category : "file") and not process.name : ("TrustedInstaller.exe", "msiexec.exe", "InstallAgent.exe", "vssadmin.exe", "wbengine.exe", "svchost.exe")

rule.name: RedSun T1574 — Rapid FILE_SUPERSEDE Loop Against Single Target
rule.description: Detects more than 15 create-or-delete events in a minute against a single file from a single process — the supersede-race primitive of the RedSun chain
rule.query: sequence by process.entity_id, file.path with maxspan=1m [file where event.action in ("creation", "deletion", "modification")] [file where event.action in ("creation", "deletion", "modification")] [file where event.action in ("creation", "deletion", "modification")] [file where event.action in ("creation", "deletion", "modification")] [file where event.action in ("creation", "deletion", "modification")] [file where event.action in ("creation", "deletion", "modification")] [file where event.action in ("creation", "deletion", "modification")] [file where event.action in ("creation", "deletion", "modification")] [file where event.action in ("creation", "deletion", "modification")] [file where event.action in ("creation", "deletion", "modification")] [file where event.action in ("creation", "deletion", "modification")] [file where event.action in ("creation", "deletion", "modification")] [file where event.action in ("creation", "deletion", "modification")] [file where event.action in ("creation", "deletion", "modification")] [file where event.action in ("creation", "deletion", "modification")]

rule.name: RedSun T1211 — EICAR Detection Inside Freshly-Registered Sync Root
rule.description: High-fidelity chain sentinel: an antivirus detection inside a directory that was registered as a Cloud Files sync root within the last 5 minutes. Matches the RedSun T1211 provocation pattern.
rule.query: sequence by host.name with maxspan=5m [registry where event.action in ("modification", "creation") and registry.path : "*\\SOFTWARE\\Microsoft\\Windows\\CurrentVersion\\SyncRootManager\\*"] [file where event.action : ("quarantine", "malware-detected", "deleted") and file.path : "*"]
